summary: Iter 11 — Three deliverables: (1) Resend domain verified — confirmed live deliveries to benitezl@go.ugr.es with 200 status; throttle 220ms prevents 429 rate limits. (2) Module unlock notification: when scheduler unlocks a module, all enrolled students get a transactional email with branded HTML template. (3) Refactor: server.py 2913→1644 lines (-43%). New modules: core.py (config/db/auth/email helpers), models.py (Pydantic), seed_data.py (DB seeding + COURSE_IA_ELE), pdf_builder.py (ReportLab), scheduler.py (jobs + templates), routes/admin_users.py (users+broadcast+unsubscribe). All 28 tests pass after each step. Smoke E2E: API, admin users, ebook PDF, frontend all 200.
files_created: /app/backend/core.py (config + db + auth deps + email helpers, 196 lines)
test_credentials: Admin: benitezl@go.ugr.es. Student: any *@example.com via magic link.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactor complete. Module structure: core.py owns env/db/auth/email helpers; models.py the Pydantic schemas; seed_data.py the seeding logic invoked from server.py on_startup; pdf_builder.py exposes build_ebook_pdf(chapters)->bytes; scheduler.py exposes run_inactivity_nudge, run_module_auto_unlock, start_inactivity_scheduler; routes/admin_users.py exposes register(api). server.py imports all of these. NO `from __future__ import annotations` in any file (breaks Pydantic v2 + FastAPI). Future extraction candidates: routes/auth.py, routes/payments.py (Stripe is huge), routes/ebook.py, routes/student.py, routes/admin.py.
